CustomField.description: Specifies the Opportunity Contact Role to assign to the Honoree Contact on an Opportunity. When populated, NPPatch automatically creates an OCR with this role for the Contact in the Honoree field. Leave blank to disable automatic Honoree Contact Role creation. Must match an existing Contact Role picklist value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact Role for Honoree Contacts on Opportunities. Leave blank to disable automatic Honoree Contact Role creation.
CustomField.label: Honoree Opportunity Contact Role
